branding.name: Suzhou Topchampion Automation Co., Ltd. (苏州赛冠)
branding.tone: Modern, high-tech, authoritative, clean, and reliable.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter uppercase

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Technical' Look - exposed skeletons, 1px subtle borders, sharp corners.

navigation.style: Sticky glassmorphism header, bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 z-50.

hero.layout: Full height or min-h-[90vh] with absolute background image and gradient overlay.
hero.visuals: Subtle motion/ambient glow behind text using absolute positioning and blur-3xl.
hero.cta: Sharp rectangular button, bg-[#0055A4] text-white font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#004080] transition-colors

trust_bar.style: Horizontal marquee or grid of text-based partner badges. Font mono, uppercase, large tracking, text-zinc-500 hover:text-white transition duration-300.

stats_counter.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 py-12 border-y border-white/10
stats_counter.styling: Numbers in H2 or H1 text-[#00E676], labels in mono text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-widest.

solutions_cards.card_style: Flat background (#1A1A1A), 1px border-white/10, group hover:border-[#0055A4]/50 transition-colors duration-300. Sharp edges (rounded-none).
solutions_cards.image_treatment: Images at top of card, h-48 w-full object-cover grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition duration-500.

engineering_timeline.layout: Vertical timeline aligned left. A single 1px vertical line (#0055A4) running down.
engineering_timeline.nodes: Steps: Consultation -> Design -> Manufacturing -> Commissioning. Active node marked by #00E676 glowing dot.

smart_quote_form.input_style: Solid dark inputs bg-[#27272A] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#0055A4] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0055A4] rounded-none text-white.

footer.style: Deep space background (#0A0A0A), top border white/10, padding py-20.
footer.content: Company Info (Suzhou, China), Links to Certifications, Social Icons (Lucide-react).

images.description: High-tech industrial manufacturing facility with vibrant blue and green LED accents. Use with black gradient overlay.
Robotic arm for automated tire production lines.
Modern electrical control panel cabinet close-up.
Detailed image of illuminated server racks showcasing modern technology infrastructure for green data center.

interactive_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons and links must always change color or background. Use Tailwind 'group' classes for parent-child interaction.
interactive_and_motion.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for smooth staggered entrances of grid items (cards, stats).
interactive_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure focus states have high contrast ring (#00E676). All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'framer-motion' for scroll reveal animations.
Strictly follow the Dark Theme. Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings; apply 'Cabinet Grotesk' via Google Fonts or standard Tailwind sans stack with strict tracking if custom font fails.
Implement the Smart Quote form using Shadcn components (Input, Select/Dropdown, Textarea).
Do not use generic placeholders for images. Use the provided exact URLs from the media section.
All cards and form fields should be sharp-edged (rounded-none) to fit the industrial aesthetic.
For the bilingual toggle, standard state toggling between 'EN' and '中文' in the UI is sufficient.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, forms, nav links, and interactive components.
